title: Oreo Truffles
excerpt: Ingredients 2 x 176 g packets Oreo biscuits, crushed in a food processor 250 ml coconut 3/4 cup plain, soft cream cheese (cream cheese) 2 tots brandy Cocoa powder as needed Method Mix all the ingredients together in a large mixing bowl. html:
Ingredients

  • 2 x 176 g packets Oreo biscuits, crushed in a food processor
  • 250 ml coconut
  • 3/4 cup plain, soft cream cheese (cream cheese)
  • 2 tots brandy
  • Cocoa powder as needed

Method

Mix all the ingredients together in a large mixing bowl. If the mixture is too wet, add a bit more coconut. Now roll the mixture into equal-sized balls, roll each one in cocoa powder and place in the fridge until firm.

Makes 25 – 30 truffles.

Easy!
